user.title: Football Match Tracker
user.description: Choose a competition to track teams from.

popular_league.title: Select Competition
popular_league.description: Choose a popular competition and season.

custom_league.title: Custom League
custom_league.description:
Enter a league shortcut and season using the OpenLigaDB API.

Common shortcuts:
- wm26 = World Cup 2026
- em = UEFA EURO 2024
- CA2024 = Copa América 2024
- bl1 = Bundesliga
- epl = Premier League
- cl1 = Champions League

error.league_not_found: League not found. Check the shortcut and season.
error.cannot_fetch_teams: Could not fetch teams for this league. Check the shortcut and season, or try a different competition.
error.no_teams_selected: Select at least one team to track.

init.title: Manage Football Tracker
init.description: Add or remove teams to track.
